title: More Connected Blocks
description: Connects some blocks I could not find in any other pack.
body:
This pack connects some blocks I could not find in any other pack. See below for more info. # Important: To get emissive (glowing) and connected textures you need to install folowing mods: - Forge: [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) - Fabric: [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - NeoForge: [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) and [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) If you're playing with Continuity and Sodium 0.5.x or lower, you also need to install Indium. On versions 0.6+ that is not needed.
## Other stuff you might want to know: In theory this pack should work for any version above 1.17 even though some blocks in this pack were first added in later versions (like for example suspicious sand) and even though minecraft might say the pack was made for an older or newer version of the game. I didn't test this yet though... For both suspicious sand and gravel only level 0 is connected right now. Maybe the other levels will come in future but I just don't think that there will ever be multiple of those blocks next to each other and beeing brushed to have exactly the same level so I just left out these textures. **This pack has 4 different versions:**
Vanilla Only connects blocks that have borders in vanilla:
- Boneblock
- Block of Emerald
- All types of froglight
- Lodestone
Blue Netherite Connects the same blocks as vanilla version but also adds emissive blue netherite.

![emissive blue netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fc2294b2b6b07be7e29cf92665db58059373a9f.png)
More Borders Connects the same blocks as vanilla version but adds:
- Suspicious Sand (emissive)
- Suspicious Gravel (emissive)
- Powder Snow

![Suspicious Sand/Gravel and Powder Snow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf2ce9c0d9b1439c296cb73d5a64fdc589301af7.png)
Full Adds everything above. So following blocks will be connected:
- Boneblock
- Block of Emerald
- All types of Froglight
- Lodestone
- Suspicious Sand (emissive)
- Suspicious Gravel (emissive)
- Powder Snow
- Blue Netherite (emissive)
I used some textures from other packs as a base to work with:
1. I used GridExpert's Suspicious Gravel/Sand textures (Check out his pack [New Glowing Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-glowing-ores)) as a base to create the connected textures for those blocks. ([New Glowing Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-glowing-ores) is licensed CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0; As of February 22, 2026) 2. Just as I did with the Sand/Gravel textures, I used loomsss's Powder Snow textures (Check out [Evident Powder Snow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/evident-powder-snow) too.) as a base to connect. ([Evident Powder Snow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/evident-powder-snow) is licensed MIT; As of February 22, 2026) 3. Just as the two above: I used ThatCuteOne's [Blue Netherite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blue-netherite) texture and added emissive parts to it. ([Blue Netherite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blue-netherite) is licensed CC-BY-4.0; As of February 22, 2026)
